transcript: Thank you for calling RadioShack, your answer team. This is Anthony, how can I help you?
Yeah, Anthony, um... how much are one of those, uh, digital goobers?
Great. Do you have 'em in stock? 'Cause the... other two... two other stores didn't have it.
No, I don't know what a "digital goober" is.
I see it here in the... in the sales circular that you put out.
Well... correct me if I'm wrong, but this is the answer team, right?
[laughing] Yeah, this is the answer team. Um...
I don't think I'm a team member, last time I checked.
[laughs] Um, I... I'm not seeing what you're talking about in the flyer. I'm lookin' at it right now, but...
Yeah, which... which... which page is that on?
Right. Now I'm runnin' a... modem. Powerless device, you know.
Are we gonna be compatible, or...?
...I'm not sure what you're talking about.
Are we gonna be compatible on that one?
I'm not sure, I... I, I don't believe so. [laughs]
Well... I just... I can't find what you're talking about, uh... in... in the sales flyer.
Are you on the sales floor, sir?
'Kay, 'kay, 'kay. But you know the item, the Realistic item I'm referring to?
I don't know the Realistic item you're referring to.
The one on page four on the sales flyer.
You want me to come down?
See if we can match up some, uh... some components, or somethin'?
Um... I'm a assistant manager who is training to become a manager.
Excellent, good for you. Good for you.
Uh, so, what was I looking for again?
Right. Now, do I go into the food court for that, or...?
Haha, in the food court for the digital goober, or to get into RadioShack? Um... they might sell goobers.
Do you want me to connect you through?
Okay, hold on a second. Uh, one second.
Um... is... is this a, a business that I called here?
Oh, I must have called the wrong number.
Yeah. You were gonna talk to him about that goober, or somethin'.
Uh, this is... this is RadioShack Southwest Plaza, young lady.
So... wh... why don't you fill him in on... on that? That...?
Yeah, why don't you tell me?
Yeah, I'm... I'm not sure what he's looking for. A customer called and, uh... and then patched me through to, I guess, you guys.
Uh, "digital goobers" is what he was looking for.
Goobers, huh? Who am I talkin' to?
Okay, well, this is Wyatt over at Wall Units. I'm not sure who's--
Okay, first it was RadioShack... and now what are you called?
I don't even know what that is.
What's this guy lookin' for, here?
He's... I don't know what he wants.
I don't know what you're talking about.
There's an ad in the Westward...
For a big opportunity, that's what I'm lookin' for.
Well, you know, whatever. Wherever it takes me. [sniffs] And I'm prepared to travel, too, so...
Oh. Well, you know what? You might have to call back tomorrow, because I have no idea what you're talking about.
I have no idea what you're talking about.
Where are you comin' from right now?
I'm at Orange Julius. Southwest Plaza, Orange Julius.
You involved with that sniagrab, or what?
It's... isn't that the flavor of the month?
I don't know, I heard it was lemon.
I don't think you know what I'm capable of, before some kinda interview, or somethin'. [clears throat]
I don't know what you're talking about! You might wanna call back tomorrow!
I'm lookin' for a meaningful position.
Well, I don't know what you're talkin' about. This...
What do you... whatta... what do you gotta be one of Zimmerman's boys to get on there, or what?
At this point, when I... when I do come down for an interview, I hope that you go ahead and put some grapes right into my mouth, because I'm a little, uh... taken aback by this.
[laughing] You cannot be fuckin' real. This cannot be fuckin' real.
So I'll come down for an interview, there... they are to be flame grapes. They are to be placed directly into my mouth... for the, uh, course of the interview.
You can talk to my manager about that, okay?
Hm. Well, you can talk to my manager.
I gotta take a leak first, pal.

You gotta go take a leak? I... I just wanna know what kinda loser sits on his ass, has nothing better to do but randomly call Orange Julius and fuckin' stupid ass prank calls, that it isn't even clever, just so he can get off the toilet.
How about I come down and hit you with a tennis racket?
You're gonna come hit me with a tennis racket. If you come up here with a tennis racket, I'll lodge it right up your ass.
Well, why don't you come on up here, man? I'll be waitin' for somebody with a tennis racket.
Nice little accent. Are you an inbred piece of shit... [unclear]
[accent changes] How's that fuckin' sound, bud?
[accent intensifying] I'll hit you as hard as a fuckin' viper, bud.
A "fuckin' viper bit"? What the fuck are you talkin' about? [unclear]
[accented] I'll swoop down at you like a crane, bud, and pick you up, bud.
You're gonna "come pick me up"? You're... you're pissin' me off, real bad. Are you ever gonna come up here, or are you just gonna hide over the phone?
Come down there with... a fuckin' twig, bud.
[mocking accent] "Come down with a fuckin' twig?" You're gonna come down and have sex with your busted grandpa and... [unclear]?
[accent reverts] Hey, I'll tell you what. You know where the Gap is?
Why don't you meet me overt the Gap in ten minutes?
Why don't you just come up here?
I'll be wearin' a turtleneck sweater, how's that sound?
A turtleneck sweater? [unclear] You're wearing a turtleneck sweater? Come right up to Orange Julius and we'll go wherever the fuck you wanna go.
[accented] I'm gonna hit you with a fuckin' cinder block, bud.
"Fuckin' cinder block, bud"? Cool, go for it, man.
For a whole bunch of good news here today.
Oh, okay. Well, come on up here with your little cinder block. Go ahead and hop on your little toilet, or wherever you do your thing... [unclear] ...some kind of attraction to the toilet. Alright?
Hey, sorry about that. I dropped the phone.
You dropped the phone. Can you not hold the phone? Are you too fuckin' r*t*rded to do that? If... you can barely hold the phone, what makes you think you can hold a cinder block--
[accented] 'Cause I'm gonna claw at you like a Kodiak bear, holmes.
Oh, are you, holmes? Out of...
Out of the fuckin' country and into the ghetto, huh? [unclear] ...are you gangsta? Are you East side?
[accented] I swoop down like a buzzard, bud.
Are you gonna go and... [unclear] Well, I'm gettin' sick of talkin' to you, dude. Just fuckin show up, or quit callin' here, you got that, you little fucker?
I'm gonna hit you with a fuckin' cinder block, buddy.
Bring the fuckin' cinder block up here with you and we'll get... we'll fuckin'... come on up and do that, alright? I'll be waitin' for you and your little bitch-ass cinder block.
Damn! Well, that's too fuckin' bad, 'cause I'm not a child. [unclear] ...come on, come up here with your little cinder block and we'll see what happens.
[accented] I'll come at you like a jag-wire, bud.
"Like a jag-wire, bud"? You gonna go bust a cap?
[unclear] I'll be waitin' up here, and if you ever decide to get off the fuckin' toilet and actually do something like a real fuckin' man, then we'll see what happens!
